page_title: Super visa for parents and grandparents: How to apply - Canada.ca

h2: Step 1: Sign in to your account
Step 3: Upload your forms and documents
Step 6: Give your biometrics after you apply If applicable
h3: IRCC Portal – New version only certain people are eligible
Get help filling out the online application
If you’ve already given your biometrics before

sections.heading: On this page
bullets: Sign in to your account
Start the application process
Upload forms and documents
Pay the fees
Submit a complete application
Give your biometrics after you apply

sections.heading: Step 1: Sign in to your account
items: You must be outside Canada when you apply for a super visa.

sections.heading: IRCC Portal
items: You can use the IRCC Portal to apply for a super visa.
Go to IRCC Portal

sections.heading: IRCC Portal – New version only certain people are eligible
items: You may be able to use the IRCC Portal – New version if you
Try the IRCC Portal – New version
bullets: are 18 years of age or older
are applying alone
have never applied for anything with us before
are not using a representative (including family or friends applying for you)

sections.heading: Step 2: Start the application process
items: You’ll be asked some questions after you sign into the Portal. Answer the following questions exactly as shown :
bullets: Select Visitor visa or super visa when asked “I want to apply for”
Select To visit my children or grandchildren for more than 6 months (super visa) when asked “Why do you need a visitor visa?”

sections.heading: Get help filling out the online application
items: If you’re having trouble with some of the questions in your IRCC Portal application, our detailed instructions may help.
Get tips on how to complete your application
If you’re applying through the IRCC Portal – New Version , there is help text built into the Portal.

sections.heading: Step 3: Upload your forms and documents
Step 4: Pay the fees
items: We’ll ask you to pay your fees at the end of your application. To pay your fees, you’ll need:
In most cases, your fees will include processing fees. If you need to give biometrics, pay the fee when you apply to avoid processing delays.
bullets: a valid email address,
access to a printer (you’ll need to print the receipt), and
a credit card, Debit MasterCard ® or Visa ® Debit card.

sections.heading: Step 5: Submit a complete application
items: Make sure your application is complete and submit it in either the
bullets: IRCC Portal , or
IRCC Portal – New version Only for eligible applicants

sections.heading: Step 6: Give your biometrics after you apply If applicable
items: Wait for your biometrics instructions letter (BIL), and then book your biometrics collection appointment as soon as you can to avoid processing delays.
Find out how to give your biometrics

sections.heading: If you’ve already given your biometrics before
items: We can’t issue you a super visa that’s valid for a period longer than your biometrics.
Extend the validity of your biometrics .
